title: elaphoglossum yunnanense
intro: Elaphoglossum yunnanense, also known as Yunnan Elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum yunnanense include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. Elaphoglossum yunnanense can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine in various herbal preparations, including poultices and topical creams.
